eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Kerr, TX; at 08:56 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 10:56 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Kerr County Emergency Alert System. This is a test and no action is required. Again this a test of the Kerr County Emergency Alert System and no action is required.
